description: Gold-standard expectations after contextual capitalization pass (pilot)
mustContain: not of him who wills, nor of him who runs
He has mercy on whom He desires, and He hardens whom He desires
Why does He still find fault
He might make known the riches of His glory
for He will finish the work
believes in Him will be disappointed

that he might make known the riches of his glory
